Loan.ContingencyFulFilled: Contingency fulfilled and lender has been notified.
Loan.DisclosureNotSent: Disclosure(s) were not sent, either you have not defined any disclosure or content for Disclosure is missing
Loan.FailedGetFundingMessage: Failed getting Funding message. You may not be authorized or application has not be processed to a cetain point.
Loan.LockRequestSent: Rate lock request sent to Applicant(s).
Loan.IAgreeToRateLockTerms: I agree to rate lock agreement
Loan.LockAgreementNotAvailable: Rate Lock agreement not provided by Lender and is not available.
Loan.RateLocked: Rate locked successfully, and Lender has been notified.
Loan.LinkedToEscrow: Loan is to Linked to an Escrow'
Loan.RemovedFromEscrow: Loan has been removed from Escrow.
Loan.Approved: Final approval for the lien has been recorded, contingent upon previously added conditions. Notifications has been sent to Applicant(s) and escrow, if required
Loan.PreApproved: Pre approval notfication sent to Applicant(s)
